project_vision: An epic, portfolio-defining ed-tech platform combining Google Classroom management with AnkiDroid spaced repetition. Designed as a cinematic, distraction-free 'Focus Mode' SaaS, completely distinct from generic LMS templates.

theme_and_archetype.rationale: Authority, Clarity, Truth. An educational tool needs strict hierarchy to reduce cognitive load. A stark, monochrome dark mode provides a cinematic, premium feel while maximizing focus during study sessions.

typography.rules: DO NOT USE Inter. Restrict font weights to radical contrasts (Light vs Black).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing + Technical Grids. Never center by default.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Mode A: 'Tetris' Grid. gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetrical bento layouts.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid. gap-1px (border collapse style) or tight gap-4. Strict data density.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use purely structural HTML (div, section) for layouts. Avoid overusing pre-built layout components that constrain asymmetry.

surfaces.headers: Crystal Glass - bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-2xl, border-b border-white/10
surfaces.cards: Flat solid backgrounds (surface_secondary), sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), 1px border-white/10, NO shadows.
surfaces.study_mode: Pure #000000 background, zero distractions. The active card uses 'Tracing Beam' glow.

component_strategies.navigation: Fixed header, Crystal Glass effect. Desktop links must be fully visible. Primary CTA is solid white text-black.
component_strategies.marketing_hero: Large expressive typography (Cabinet Grotesk). Abstract dark architecture image in background with bg-black/50 overlay. Bento grid stats below.
component_strategies.dashboards: Role-based. Use Shadcn components (tables, charts, select) but strip their default borders and radii to match the sharp, cardless brutalist aesthetic. Use Recharts for analytics with monochrome lines and minimal axes.
component_strategies.flashcard_study_mode: THE HEADLINER. Full-screen cinematic mode. Center flashcard component. Uses Framer Motion for 3D rotateX/rotateY flip on Spacebar press. Numbers 1-4 mapped to rate quality. Glassmorphic progress bar floating at bottom.
component_strategies.split_screen_notes: Grid Borders layout. 50/50 split. Left: Tiptap Markdown Editor (distraction-free, minimal toolbar). Right: PDF Viewer (GridFS) or Live Preview. 1px solid border between them.
component_strategies.ai_magic_button: Placed prominently in Deck view. Uses the 'Tracing Beam' (animated glowing border) to draw attention without being loud.
component_strategies.jitsi_meetings: Embedded iframe wrapped in a sharp, 1px bordered container. Course-scoped room names dynamically generated.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Text color shifts (e.g., text-secondary to text-primary), subtle background lightness shifts. ALWAYS define explicit hover colors.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Smooth momentum scrolling (Lenis) for marketing pages. Staggered fade-up for dashboard bento grids.
motion_and_interactions.flashcard_flip: Framer motion 3D rotation. Must respect prefers-reduced-motion.

media_and_assets.iconography: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Duotone weight for marketing, Regular for dashboards.

images.description: High-contrast monochrome geometric stairs for the landing page background. Adds depth without distracting from typography.
Focused student reading, to be used in the marketing 'Why us' or Testimonial section.
Dark abstract gray digital texture to use as a subtle background pattern for empty states or generic course thumbnails.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA 4.5:1. Active UI elements must have clear focus rings.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and flashcards MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='flashcard-flip-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL OVERRIDE: Write components in .jsx / .js files. DO NOT USE .tsx files, as per the critical rules provided. Adjust Next.js config or imports as needed to support .js/.jsx.
Implement Shadcn UI using pure Tailwind CSS utility classes customized for a sharp, brutalist, flat design (no rounded corners, no soft shadows).
For Flashcard study mode, prioritize keyboard events (Space to flip, 1-4 for Anki scoring) and bind them to the UI state.
Use Tiptap for the notes editor. Build a custom minimal toolbar that fits the stark aesthetic.
Embed Jitsi Meet using their external API script or iframe, ensuring the container respects the dark mode theme.
Integrate Phosphor icons as the default icon set.
Use framer-motion for the flashcard flip and staggered bento grid entrances.
